crimson_showers.name: The Gale
crimson_showers.description: Lulwy's wind scatters the meteor trails. Followers of the Gale track extraction across storm-swept lands.

crimson_showers.name: The Mountain
crimson_showers.description: Opatos's endurance. The Mountain stands firm against the crimson rain.

crimson_showers.name: The Flame
crimson_showers.description: Itzpalt's fire mirrors the meteor showers. Those aligned see magic in the chaos.

crimson_showers.name: The Harvest
crimson_showers.description: Kumiromi's growth feeds on starfall. The Harvest transforms destruction into bounty.

crimson_showers.name: The Cat's Eye
crimson_showers.description: Ehekatl's luck shines brightest when stars fall. Chance favors the bold.

whispering_tides.name: The Gale
whispering_tides.description: Lulwy's breath carries whispers from distant rifts. The Gale listens.

whispering_tides.name: The Mountain
whispering_tides.description: Opatos anchors the tides. His followers weather every storm.

whispering_tides.name: The Flame
whispering_tides.description: Itzpalt's fire burns beneath the waves. The Flame ignites even in the deep.

whispering_tides.name: The Harvest
whispering_tides.description: Kumiromi sees bounty in the tidal surge. Every cleansed entity feeds the vine.

whispering_tides.name: The Cat's Eye
whispering_tides.description: Ehekatl dances on the waves. Fortune favors the curious.

hollow_eye.name: The Gale
hollow_eye.description: Lulwy's wind howls through the hollow spaces between dimensions.

hollow_eye.name: The Mountain
hollow_eye.description: Opatos's stone resists the incursion. The Mountain will not be moved.

hollow_eye.name: The Flame
hollow_eye.description: Itzpalt studies the Yith with scholarly detachment. Knowledge through fire.

hollow_eye.name: The Harvest
hollow_eye.description: Kumiromi tends the wounded lands. Even hollow ground can bear fruit.

hollow_eye.name: The Cat's Eye
hollow_eye.description: Ehekatl peers into the void and finds it amusing. The Eye blinks back.

frozen_radiance.name: The Gale
frozen_radiance.description: Lulwy's frozen breath carries crystalline starlight on arctic winds.

frozen_radiance.name: The Mountain
frozen_radiance.description: Opatos gleams with frost. The Mountain's patience outlasts even winter.

frozen_radiance.name: The Flame
frozen_radiance.description: Itzpalt's fire defies the cold. His followers forge meaning from frozen light.

frozen_radiance.name: The Harvest
frozen_radiance.description: Kumiromi sleeps beneath the snow, waiting. The Harvest is patient.

frozen_radiance.name: The Cat's Eye
frozen_radiance.description: Ehekatl's luck glitters in the frost. Every step on ice is a gamble she adores.
